specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services, and we've built a reputation for honest, reliable work that boat owners throughout the region have come to count on. Your boat is a significant investment, and we treat it that way.

Our team handles everything from thorough boat surveying and inspection — whether you're buying, selling, or just want peace of mind — to diving and underwater services for hull work, prop inspections, and below-the-waterline repairs. We also specialize in marine AC and climate control systems, keeping your cabin comfortable in the heat, and marine plumbing and sanitation, so your heads, holding tanks, and freshwater systems stay in proper working order. Whatever your vessel needs, we've got the skills and equipment to handle it.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, covering a wide service area within 60 miles. Whether you're docked at a marina, anchored out, or hauled up in a boatyard, Ben's Boatworks comes to you. We understand that downtime on the water is frustrating, and we work efficiently to get you back out there. If you're in the Annapolis, MD area or anywhere across our South Florida service range, give us a call — we're here to help.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks conducts detailed boat surveys and inspections to assess the structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition of your vessel. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey, insurance survey, or a routine condition-and-value report, we give you a thorough, unbiased look at exactly what you're working with. Knowing your boat's true condition protects your investment and keeps you safe on the water.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull cleaning, prop inspections, zinc replacement, through-hull checks, and below-the-waterline repairs — all without the need to haul your vessel out of the water. We use professional dive equipment to assess and address underwater issues quickly and accurately. Keeping your hull clean and your underwater gear in good shape directly impacts your boat's performance and fuel efficiency.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable in any conditions. We work on chilled water systems, self-contained units, and reverse-cycle systems across a wide range of vessel types. Proper climate control isn't just about comfort — it also protects electronics, upholstery, and other onboard components from heat and humidity damage.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We handle marine plumbing and sanitation systems including freshwater systems, raw water systems, holding tanks, marine heads, and Y-valve configurations to keep everything flowing the way it should. Our work covers both new installations and troubleshooting existing systems that aren't performing correctly. A properly functioning sanitation system is essential for compliance, comfort, and the long-term health of your vessel.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection report
Hull cleaning and zinc replacement via professional underwater diving
Marine AC system repair or new unit installation onboard
Holding tank and marine head replacement or repair
Below-waterline prop inspection and minor running gear repairs
Freshwater system troubleshooting and plumbing leak repairs
Insurance or damage survey following a collision or grounding
